source_name: Code4rena Noya Findings and Analysis Report (2024-04)
finding_title: Decreasing a position in PendleConnector will remove it even if there’s still a stake at Penpie
summary: decreasePosition() will falsely remove the market as a holding position, ignoring the staked Pendle market LP tokens at Penpie and thus that stake won’t be counted towards the TVL of the connector and the TVL of the AccountingManager the connector belongs to.
root_cause: Pendle decrease-position logic removes the holding position even while staked Penpie/Pendle LP exposure remains active
broken_invariants: redemption flow valuation must remain correct under the root cause: Pendle decrease-position logic removes the holding position even while staked Penpie/Pendle LP exposure remains active
oracle, TVL, and collateral valuation must use correctly scaled, fresh, and manipulation-resistant inputs
users must retain a reliable exit path unless an explicitly designed and validated pause or restriction is active
attack_preconditions: the affected component is deployed or configured in the way described by the final report
the report-described user, keeper, vault, connector, oracle, or liquidation flow is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, keeper, liquidator, vault participant, or protocol-integrated actor able to trigger the affected flow
trigger_actions: execute the report-described function sequence or state transition
observe mispricing, accounting drift, value loss, fund lock, or denial of service

impact.description: decreasePosition() will falsely remove the market as a holding position, ignoring the staked Pendle market LP tokens at Penpie and thus that stake won’t be counted towards the TVL of the connector and the TVL of the AccountingManager the connector belongs to.

why_not_higher: already classified as High in the final C4 report
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with public report evidence and affected code/finding references
common_false_positive_angles: verify the same component and configuration are in scope
check whether the issue is reachable by an untrusted or economically motivated actor
confirm the impact is more than a view-only mismatch, dust loss, or privileged-only misconfiguration
mitigations: In the isMarketOpen() function check for the connector’s balance in the Penpie staking pool for this market. diff --git a/contracts/connectors/PendleConnector.sol b/contracts/connectors/PendleConnector.sol index 17607ee..e1b1208 100644 --- a/contracts/connectors/PendleConnector.sol +++ b/contracts/connectors/PendleConnector.sol @@ -304,7 +304,7 @@ contract PendleConnector is BaseConnector { (IPStandardizedYield _SY, IPPrincipalToken _PT, IPYieldToken _YT) = IPMarket(market).readTokens(); return ( _SY.balanceOf(address(this)) == 0 && _PT.balanceOf(address(this)) == 0 && _YT.balanceOf(address(this)) == 0 - && market.balanceOf(address(this)) == 0 + && market.balanceOf(address(this)) == 0 && pendleMarketDepositHelper.balance(market, address(this)) == 0 ); }
